rounds.title: Join shells
rounds.sourceText: To connect 2 shells, use 10slst. FLO from the top shell, BLO from bottom shell.

statements.sourceText: To connect 2 shells, use 10slst. FLO from the top shell, BLO from bottom shell.

operation.instruction: To connect 2 shells, use 10slst. FLO from the top shell, BLO from bottom shell.
